creator: bugs.freebsd.org@msqr.us
text: The current databases/timescaledb port has been updated to Timescale DB version 2.0. That version only supports Postgres 11 & 12, but I still depend on Postgres 9.6. I was hoping then the 2.0 port arrived it would be something like databases/timescaledb2, or else the old port migrated to something like databases/timescaledb1. I've never dealt with this type of package versioning issue before, so didn't know the approach to take to get a new port added for TimescaleDB 1.7.4 (the last version that supported Postgres 9.6/10).
